summary: Removed the repo-root target_funcs.txt file. The deleted file listed src/melee/gr/granime.c and eight checked grAnime target functions. No source code files were changed in this PR slice, and the bot report said GALE01 had no changes.

key_files.role: Deleted target function tracking file listing checked grAnime functions.
evidence_refs: diff: File: src/melee/gr/granime.c; Funcs: eight checked grAnime_* entries

key_files.role: Referenced by the deleted target list; not changed in this PR slice.

what_changed.text: Deleted target_funcs.txt from the repository root.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: diff --git a/target_funcs.txt b/target_funcs.txt; deleted file mode 100644

what_changed.text: The removed file contained a checked list of grAnime_801C86D4, grAnime_801C84A4, grAnime_801C8578, grAnime_801C6A54, grAnime_801C752C, grAnime_801C6C0C, grAnime_801C7228, and grAnime_801C7C1C under src/melee/gr/granime.c.
No C source, header, symbol, split, or assembly file changes are present in the loaded slice.
The automated GALE01 report comment stated 'No changes'.

smart_moves.text: Kept the PR scoped to removing the target tracking file only, avoiding unrelated source or data churn.

decomp_lessons.text: A PR may be purely administrative after target functions are complete; intake should distinguish deletion of a tracking file from source-level decomp changes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deleted target_funcs.txt containing checked grAnime targets

review_feedback.text: No human review comments or reviews were present in the loaded PR slice.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR number, title, author, state, dates, changed file counts
raw_diff: full diff is present and not truncated
text_corpus.jsonl: empty PR body and bot issue comment
notes: Evidence is strong for the file deletion and the exact removed target list.
Evidence is weak for why the target functions were ready to remove; the PR body is empty and there are no human review comments.
The bot's 'No changes' report is recorded as a report comment only; no independent build, objdiff, or regression validation was performed during intake.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Administrative target-list removals are not source decomp changes
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2548 removed only target_funcs.txt, a repo-root file listing checked grAnime targets. No source files changed in the loaded slice, so curator records should treat it as target tracking cleanup rather than a source matching tactic or code lesson.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that the listed grAnime functions were newly matched by this PR; the slice only shows removal of a checked target list.
Do not infer reviewer intent or acceptance rationale; no human review comments are present.
Do not promote the bot 'No changes' comment into a general validation result beyond this PR report evidence.
